name: agentic-orchestration
description: Orchestration framework for Claude Code: generic architect/engineer/reviewer specialists and a dispatch workflow that bind to any project via its CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: orchestration
plugins.description: Generic orchestration workflow: chuck-architect, the single generic chuck-engineer, chuck-plan/code-reviewer agents plus the orchestration-settings-manager meta agent, the /orchestrate and /orchestrate-config commands, and plan/code review rubrics.
